rule_text: Price Adjustment (both positive and negative) is applicable to all AP works of Rs.40 lakh and above where the original contract period is six months or more.
source_clause: GO Ms No 62 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 30-11-2021, Para 2(a)(i)
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND EstimatedValue>=4000000 AND OriginalContractPeriodMonths>=6
verification_method: Check tender BDS contains Price Adjustment clause; if value>=40L AND period>=6mo, clause must be present and must allow both +ve and -ve adjustment

rule_text: Price Adjustment is NOT applicable to works of Rs.40 lakh and above where original contract period is less than six months; Extensions of Time (EOTs) granted shall not be counted for price adjustment.
source_clause: GO Ms No 62 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 30-11-2021, Para 2(a)(ii)
verification_method: If period<6mo, tender must NOT include Price Adjustment for the original period; flag if PVC clause was incorrectly invoked via EOT

rule_text: Price Adjustment shall NOT be applicable to AP works valued less than Rs.40 lakh, irrespective of contract period.
source_clause: GO Ms No 62 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 30-11-2021, Para 2(a)(iii)
verification_method: Tenders below Rs.40L must NOT include PVC clause; flag as over-protective if present

rule_text: Price Adjustment is permitted only when the variation between estimated rates and current rates is greater than +5% or less than -5%; the differential amount is computed after adding/deducting the initial 5% buffer.
source_clause: GO Ms No 62 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 30-11-2021, Para 2(c)
verification_method: Verify PVC formula in tender uses 5% trigger threshold and differential-after-buffer computation; reject formulas without 5% deadband

rule_text: Tender percentage (premium or discount, +/-) shall NOT be applied on the Price Adjustment amount computed.
source_clause: GO Ms No 62 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 30-11-2021, Para 2(d)
verification_method: Check PA bill computation: tender_percentage_factor must be applied to base bill only, not to PA amount

rule_text: Price Adjustment supersedes all earlier department-specific orders (TR&B, Panchayat Raj, MA&UD, I&CAD, Water Resources from 2006-2015) — GO Ms 62/2021 is the sole comprehensive AP authority.
source_clause: GO Ms No 62 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 30-11-2021, Order Para 5
verification_method: For tenders post-30-Nov-2021, PVC must reference GO Ms 62/2021 (not legacy TR&B / PR / MA&UD orders); legacy citations alone are insufficient

rule_text: For Steel and Cement items, Price Adjustment is computed monthly using rates approved by the Board of Chief Engineers (BoCE), which meets on the 10th of each month and recommends rates to the Secretary, Water Resources Dept.
source_clause: GO Ms No 62 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 30-11-2021, Para 3(c)(i)(a)–(c)
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND PriceAdjustmentApplicable=true AND Material IN [Steel, Cement]
verification_method: Check that PA bills for Steel/Cement use the BoCE-approved monthly rate certified by Water Resources Secretary; reject ad-hoc or quotation-based pricing

rule_text: For Bitumen and Petroleum/Lubricants (PoLs), Price Adjustment is computed fortnightly using prices published on Public Sector Undertaking (PSU) websites.
source_clause: GO Ms No 62 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 30-11-2021, Para 3(c)(ii)(a)–(b)
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND PriceAdjustmentApplicable=true AND Material IN [Bitumen, PoL, HSD]
verification_method: Check PA bills for Bitumen/PoL reference fortnightly PSU-published rates (IOCL/HPCL/BPCL website rates); reject quotation-based or estimate-rate-based PA
